notes: gpuMs is derived from Chromium trace pipeline stages from draw start through swap end.
presentMs is swap-end to compositor presentation latency, captured from the same trace window.
GPU trace was captured in a second chromium-headless pass and merged onto the primary perf report by replay tick.
